author: nero_eth
content:
We have clarified one interaction between EIP-7997 (Factory Deployer) and EIP-7928 (BALs):
At the fork transition block, check that the factory exists (state access) and if not, deploy it (state write) -> both generate witnesses + BAL entries.
For mainnet, this means we'll end up with the factory as a read in the BAL.

EELS PR: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/3200
EIP PR: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11991

cc <@774033563732541451> <@&1460290804898861117>
